mapper.select: SELECT id, open_id, union_id, nick_name, headimg_url, phone, create_time, update_time FROM wx_user WHERE open_id = #{openid} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, open_id, union_id, nick_name, headimg_url, phone, create_time, update_time FROM wx_user WHERE id = #{id} AND (del_flag = '0' OR del_flag IS NULL) LIMIT 1
SELECT id, open_id, union_id, nick_name, headimg_url, phone, create_time, update_time FROM wx_user WHERE phone = #{phone} AND (del_flag = '0' OR del_flag IS NULL) ORDER BY update_time DESC LIMIT 1

sql.where:
(del_flag = '0' OR del_flag IS NULL)
AND phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{phone}, '%')
AND nick_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{nickname}, '%')

mapper.select:
SELECT id, open_id, union_id, nick_name, headimg_url, phone, create_time, update_time FROM wx_user
ORDER BY update_time DESC, create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wx_user (id, open_id, union_id, nick_name, headimg_url, app_type, del_flag) VALUES (#{u.id}, #{u.openid}, #{u.unionid}, #{u.nickname}, #{u.avatarUrl}, '1', '0') ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE union_id = COALESCE(VALUES(union_id), union_id), nick_name = COALESCE(VALUES(nick_name), nick_name), headimg_url = COALESCE(VALUES(headimg_url), headimg_url), update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.update: UPDATE wx_user SET phone = #{phone}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE open_id = #{openid}
